pharmacies.notes: Novo Nordisk self-pay program. $199/mo first 2 fills for 0.25/0.5mg (new patients through 12/31/2026), then $349 for all doses. Free home delivery via CoAssist Pharmacy.
GoodRx coupon at 70,000+ pharmacies. $199/mo first 2 fills (0.25/0.5mg), then $349/mo all doses. Avg retail price ~$1,642. Wegovy pill also available at $149/mo (1.5/4mg).
NovoCare self-pay pricing via Amazon Pharmacy. Automatic coupons at checkout. Home delivery to all 50 states. Wegovy pill also $149/mo.
$59-$99/mo subscription. Medication priced separately. Wegovy pen $199/mo first 2 fills, then $349/mo. Wegovy pill $149/mo (1.5/4mg), $299/mo (9/25mg).
Ro Body membership $145/mo program fee. GLP-1s from $349/mo. Insurance or cash-pay. Wegovy pen and pill available.
$49/mo membership. Wegovy $1,599/mo billed separately. Cash-pay only, no insurance accepted.
$19.99/mo membership + $129/visit. Branded GLP-1s ~$1,000/mo out of pocket. Rx Discount Card saves 7-20%.
Membership $25-$49 first month, then $74-$145/mo. Medication not included. Wegovy list price $1,349.02/mo. Insurance coordination available.
Branded injections via NovoCare pricing $199-$349/mo. Also offers compounded semaglutide $199/mo. Wegovy pill $149/mo.
$39/mo membership (intro rate). Medication priced separately. Wegovy pen $199/mo first 2 fills, then $349/mo. Wegovy pill $149/mo (1.5/4mg).
